subject: Read-only support: P8 interaction tests
body: Assignment from Pearly Drifting Jetty. Take a read-only support lane for Nebulous's P8 Slice B. No edits, no claim, no git activity unless you first ask and I reroute. Inspect the controller/app tests and React/Ink warning debt. Reply to Nebulous and me with a concise READINESS note: likely cause of the act warning, minimum focus/scroll/refresh tests, and any boundary risks. Treat this as support, not a blocker unless you find a clear correctness issue.
